S.text: Referred for RGP fitting for keratoconus OD; soft lenses gave unstable/fluctuating vision.

O.text: Topography: steep/irregular cornea OD (keratoconus), OS near-normal.
Trial RGP OD: base curve 7.1 mm (steep, to vault the cone), diameter 9.6 mm (initial '9.point-' corrected to 9.6).
Trial RGP OS: base curve 7.8 mm, diameter 9.6 mm (standard).
Fluorescein OD: light apical touch with surrounding pooling (near-ideal three-point-touch vault); ~1 mm movement, acceptable centration.
Fluorescein OS: even pattern, well centered, good edge clearance, ~1 mm movement.
Over-refraction OD: +0.50 yields 20/25 (masking corneal irregularity); OS 20/20.

A.text: Keratoconus OD; successful RGP fit vaulting the cone with markedly improved best acuity vs prior soft lenses; standard RGP fit OS.

P.text: Prescribe RGP: OD base curve 7.1 mm, diameter 9.6 mm; OS base curve 7.8 mm, diameter 9.6 mm; power incorporating over-refraction.
Rigid-lens adaptation schedule: few hours day one, add ~1 hour daily.
Early follow-up in a few days to recheck fit/corneal surface, then again at one week.
